mapper.select:
SELECT cr.room_id, cr.room_name, cr.target_id, cr.theme_id, cr.created_at FROM member m
INNER JOIN chat_room_members crm ON m.id = crm.member_id
INNER JOIN chat_rooms cr ON crm.room_id = cr.room_id
WHERE m.id = #{memberId} ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( room_name, target_id, theme_id ) VALUES ( #{roomName}, #{targetId}, #{themeId} )
